summary: AiForge final validation pass — ALL previously-identified blockers from iteration_2 are now fixed. Backend pytest: 28/28 PASS (76s). Frontend mobile-viewport Playwright on the public preview URL: login (no Google button), home (ghost AiForge logo PNG behind welcome card), Create→AI Assist (Multi-turn chat panel renders), Plans tab (6 tiers including Quantum $99.99 and Singularity $199.99) all verified. Quantum Upgrade button observed end-to-end: tap → POST /api/checkout/create → 200 with real Stripe checkout URL (cs_test_a1NZGrSBLS3E3o...). Multi-turn chat continuity now PASSES (FALCON-99 / BANANA-42 recall test). Checkout endpoint accepts plan='quantum' and plan='singularity' (both 200). Image gen (Nano Banana) returns base64 PNG; SCAD returns code + non-null preview_image (>500 bytes). Free user 6th gen returns 402 on both /generate and /generate/scad. /api/plans returns the expected 6 tiers with correct prices ['free 0, spark 9.99, forge 29.99, neon 49.99, quantum 99.99, singularity 199.99']. register / login / me regression all green. No NEW issues. Pre-existing non-blocking deprecation warnings (shadow* style props, props.pointerEvents) still emitted from RN web — cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.issue: Non-blocking deprecation warning emitted on every screen. Replace with 'boxShadow'. References: GhostLogoBackground, CreationCard, plan cards, home category cards in /app/frontend/app and /app/frontend/src.
Non-blocking deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — move pointerEvents prop into the style object.

action_items: OPTIONAL CLEANUP (non-blocking): migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and pointerEvents prop into style object to silence RN-web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/chat now correctly persists messages in db.chat_sessions and replays prior transcript into LlmChat — verified via multi-turn pytest (FALCON-99 recall).
CheckoutRequest.plan Literal expanded to include 'quantum' and 'singularity' — both verified end-to-end with live Stripe URLs.
server.py is still ~640 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth.py, generate.py, creations.py, payments.py) for maintainability — not a blocker.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_aiforge_backend.py (added quantum + singularity checkout tests; made multi-turn-chat and video tests use isolated fresh users to avoid daily-limit collisions; added EXPO_BACKEND_URL fallback)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows exercised (login no-Google, home ghost-logo, Create AI Assist panel, Plans 6-tier with working Quantum upgrade → Stripe)

seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_*@example.com users via /api/auth/register; demo@example.com/demo1234 used for shared read-only flows and Stripe checkout creation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is in a clean GREEN state. If asked to retest, the full 28-case backend suite at /app/backend/tests/test_aiforge_backend.py runs in ~75s and covers health, 6-tier plans, auth (register/login/me/google-invalid), creations CRUD + stats, generation (image/model3d/chat/scad/video), multi-turn chat continuity, daily-limit 402 on both /generate and /generate/scad, and Stripe checkout for spark/quantum/singularity/invalid. Only remaining cosmetic items are shadow* / pointerEvents deprecation warnings.
